name: Snoww, Unlight of Dark World
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> スノウ
desc: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: If it was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; add 1 "Dark World" card from your Deck to your hand, then Special Summon that target (if any) in Defense Position.
mnst_eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: If it was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; add 1 "Dark World" card from your Deck to your hand, then Special Summon that target (if any) in Defense Position.
eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: If it was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; add 1 "Dark World" card from your Deck to your hand, then Special Summon that target (if any) in Defense Position.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
